title: May 8
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}

'''May 8''' is the 128th day of the year (129th in leap years). There are 237 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 41|''Star Wars'' (1998) 41]] published.
*2002 – ''[[Star Wars: Episode II — Attack of the Clones 4]]'' published.
*2002 – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 19]]'' published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Invasion 0, Part 1]]'' published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2019]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 32|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 32]] published.
*2019 – [[Age of Rebellion - Boba Fett 1|''Age of Rebellion - Boba Fett'' 1]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 21|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 21]] published.
*2019 – [[Justin Ponsor]] dies.
*[[2020]] – "[[Legacy (Disney Gallery: The Mandalorian)|Legacy]]" premieres on [[Disney+]]
*[[2024]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 46|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 46]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic (2023) 7|''The High Republic'' (2023) 7]] published.
*2024 – [[John Barbata]] dies.
